detail: JP records are on Harris County's Odyssey portal (PACER is federal-only). Needs a source decision: Odyssey scraper, January Advisers eviction dataset, or TDCJ bulk export.
CENSUS_API_KEY not set — get one at api.census.gov/data/key_signup.html (2 min), add to .env.local + Vercel
